snippet.title: [URDU] 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event | Grand Finals | Day 2 | PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1
snippet.description:
The 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 Grand Finals reaches its final day. 1,000,000+ players across the globe wanted to be on this stage. Only a handful of them have shown they are more skillful than the rest, and now it all comes down to this. Someone is sitting on the edge of glory, and the only thing standing between them and the trophy is one more match win. This is where legends are made.

And the SMASH RULE is in play the most exciting way to claim the trophy. Hit the threshold and close it out with a match win, and the title is yours.

🏆 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

📋 FORMAT

Group Stage :
• 32 teams split into 2 groups of 16
• 2 days total (1 day per group)
• Overall Ranking 1–6 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 7–14 → Survival Stage
• Overall Ranking 15–16 → Eliminated

Survival Stage : 
• Overall Ranking 1–4 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 5–16 → Eliminated

Grand Finals (SMASH Rule)
• 16 teams — 2 days, 6 matches per day

🔥 SMASH RULE ( On Day 2) 
Day 1 Overall Ranking #1 team's points +10 = Match Point Threshold
Hit the threshold on Day 2, then win another match to claim the title.
No SMASH? Highest total points wins under standard overall ranking.

snippet.title: Asim Azhar - Tu Hai Wohi (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Some people feel impossible to forget.

Tu Hai Wohi is Asim Azhar’s contemporary recreation of a timeless melody, blending nostalgia with modern pop and R&B emotion. Built around the unforgettable essence of Kishore Kumar’s original vocal sample and R. D. Burman’s iconic composition, the song captures the ache of waiting, searching, and holding on to a love that still feels unfinished.

🎶 Listen / Stream on your favorite platform:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/3hrvVVBKL6jfpqGzR2WSlH?si=ad874df466264893

Mere Haal Par – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Na jawaab de…
na sawaal kar…
mujhe chhod de
mere haal par.

Tujhe kya milega
mujhe tod kar…
hum to pehle hi
andar se bikhar chuke hain.

Mohabbat ne
itna tanha kar diya…
ab kisi se
shikayat bhi nahi hoti.

“Mere Haal Par”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo dard me bhi
khamoshi se jeena seekh gaya.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

mujhe chhod do
mere haal par…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein sirf dard mila ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

Na jawaab de…
na sawaal kar…
mujhe chhod de
mere haal par.

Tujhe kya milega
mujhe tod kar…
hum to pehle hi
andar se bikhar chuke hain.

Mohabbat ne
itna tanha kar diya…
ab kisi se
shikayat bhi nahi hoti.

“Mere Haal Par”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo dard me bhi
khamoshi se jeena seekh gaya.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

mujhe chhod do
mere haal par…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein sirf dard mila ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.
